mission.title: coredns: avahi / Bonjour / mDNS plugin for CoreDNS?
mission.description: avahi / Bonjour / mDNS plugin for CoreDNS?. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current coredns deployment
steps.description:
Verify your coredns version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns
helm list -n coredns 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working coredns installation.

steps.title: Review coredns configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant coredns configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns
kubectl get configmap -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=coredns
```
I am using Avahi on a Raspberry Pi (running Hypriot) to advertise a hostname.local on the local network.

steps.title: Apply the fix for avahi / Bonjour / mDNS plugin for CoreDNS?
steps.description:

```yaml
$ dns-sd -G v4 idaeus.local
DATE: ---Sat 10 Feb 2018---
14:55:14.640  ...STARTING...
Timestamp     A/R Flags if Hostname                               Address                                      TTL
14:55:14.837  Add     2  4 idaeus.local.                          10.10.10.192                                 120

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns
kubectl get events -n coredns --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "avahi / Bonjour / mDNS plugin for CoreDNS?" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Or maybe not for one-shot queries. Sigh. I can't look into it more now, maybe tomorrow.

```
   The most basic kind of Multicast DNS client may simply send standard
   DNS queries blindly to 192.0.2.1:5353, without necessarily even
   being aware of what a multicast address is.  This change can
   typically be implemented with just a few lines of code in an existing
   DNS resolver library.
codeSnippets:
$ dns-sd -G v4 idaeus.local
DATE: ---Sat 10 Feb 2018---
14:55:14.640  ...STARTING...
Timestamp     A/R Flags if Hostname                               Address                                      TTL
14:55:14.837  Add     2  4 idaeus.local.                          10.10.10.192                                 120

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with coredns installed or the issue environment reproducible.
